ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beaches" (
  "beach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beach */,
  "beach_name" TEXT /* Name of the beach */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the beach is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the beach */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beach */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the beach */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the beach */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the beach */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about the accessibility of the beach */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beaches_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county data was last updated */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality test */,
  "beach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beach where the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the water quality test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the water quality test (e.g., safe, potentially unsafe) */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method used */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the water sample */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_beach_id FOREIGN KEY ("beach_id") REFERENCES beaches ("beach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_test_result FOREIGN KEY ("test_result") REFERENCES test_results ("result_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy rate of the test method */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the test method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the test method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the test method data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the test result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test result */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the test result */,
  "action_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required based on the result */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the test result data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual report */,
  "beach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beach the report pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "potentially_unsafe_days" INTEGER /* Number of days with potentially unsafe water */,
  "days_with_testing" INTEGER /* Number of days with water testing */,
  "percentage_unsafe" REAL /* Percentage of testing days with potentially unsafe water */,
  "total_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted during the year */,
  "average_test_result" REAL /* Average test result for the year */,
  "improvement_percentage" REAL /* Percentage improvement in water quality compared to the previous year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_beach_id FOREIGN KEY ("beach_id") REFERENCES beaches ("beach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, health officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., beach, test, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser and device) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES beaches ("beach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "beach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beach related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_beach_id FOREIGN KEY ("beach_id") REFERENCES beaches ("beach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "beach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beach the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data entry */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data entry */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method used */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the water sample */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_beach_id FOREIGN KEY ("beach_id") REFERENCES beaches ("beach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "beach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beach the report pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the compliance status */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the compliance check */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compliance inspection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the compliance report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_beach_id FOREIGN KEY ("beach_id") REFERENCES beaches ("beach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
